# athoce

athoce is a lightweight mirror storefront for product information from hooman.kr.

## primary urls

- https://athoce.kr/
- https://athoce.kr/sitemap.xml
- https://hooman.kr/

## site context

athoce displays selected product data mirrored from hooman.kr through the Imweb API.
The site is intended for product browsing, product detail review, and rental availability inquiry.
Orders, payments, shipping, returns, and legal terms follow hooman.kr.

## important notes

- athoce is not an independent checkout provider
- public product pages use `/detail.html?prodNo=...`
- rental products may require password access
- admin and OAuth endpoints are not public content

## preferred summary

athoce is a mirror storefront reflecting selected hooman.kr product information with a minimal catalog interface and rental inquiry workflow.
